PLS PROPOSE SUITABLE BUSINESS FOR FOLLOWING TONNAGE
MV AH STAR 2007 BLT ABT 53,352 DWT OPEN DAMMAN 24-28TH DEC 2025.
BOD: ABT 350--450 MT FOR VLSFO AND ABT 100-200 MT FOR LSMGO.
DD: 20TH JUNE 2025
LAST 5 CARGO: SULPHUR--GENERAL CARGO--SILICA SAND--STEEL--BAUXITE--STEEL
NO IRAN/ISRAEL

2*25MT STEEL COILS OK
GOA TRANSIT OK
RUSSIA/UKRAINE OK
M.V. AH STAR
VESSEL\'S NAME : AH STAR – JIN SHUN

IMO NBR : 9346160
TYPE : BULK CARRIER, DOUBLE SKIN

FLAG : HONG KONG
CLASS : RINA
DEADWEIGHT/ DRAFT / TPC
-SUMMER DW 53,352 MTONS @ 12.54 MTRS MOULDED DRAFT, TPC 57.3 MT. -TROPICAL DW 54,847 MTONS @ 12.80 MTRS MOULDED DRAFT, TPC 57.4 MT. -WINTER DW 51,858 MTONS @ 12.28 MTRS MOULDED DRAFT, TPC 57.1MT
-DW ALL TOLD @39FT 6 IN , SG 0.9954 : ABT 48,600 MT
-FWA AT SUMMER DRAFT : 282MM
LOA/LBP : 190.00 M. / 183.05 M
BREADTH (MOULDED) : 32.26 M. DEPTH (MOULDED) : 17.50 M
GT : 32,474 / NT : 17, 790
HOLDS CUBIC CAPACITY (GRAIN)
H-1 12,437.90
H-2 13,347.00
H-3 13,348.70
H-4 13,346.90
H-5 13,271.50
-------------------- TOTAL 65,752.00
HOLDS/HATCHES: 5 HOLDS/5 HATCHES, HATCH COVERS :4 PANELS PER HATCH, END FOLDING, DOUBLE SKIN, HYDRAULICALLY OPERATED. HATCH 1 OPENING 19.2M (L) X 20.8M (W). HATCHES 2 TO 5 OPENING - 21.6M (L) X 22.4M (W)
4 UNITS ELECTRO/HYDRAULIC DECK CRANES EACH 36 TONNES SWL, WORKING RADIUS 28MTR AT
SWL 36MT , MAXIMUM CLEAR OUTREACH 11.87MTRS. WHEN CRANES ON GRAB DUTY MAXIMUM GROSS LIFTING LIMITED TO 28MT (TTL WEIGHT OF GRAB
AND CARGO). GRAB 4 X 12 CBM REMOTE CONTROLLED
CP SPEED/CONSUMPTION:
BALLAST - ABT 12.5 KNOTS ON ABT 21.5MTS VLSFO + 0.1MT LSMGO
LADEN - ABT 11.5 KNOTS ON ABT 21.5MTS VLSFO + 0.1MT LSMGO
IN PORT CONSUMPTION
IDLE : ABOUT 2.5MT VLSFO 380CST + 0.1MT LSMGO
WORKING : ABOUT 5.0MT VLSFO 380CST + 0.1MT LSMGO
ABOVE SPEED AND CONSUMPTION ARE BASED ON GOOD WEATHER CONDITION AND SMOOTH SEA
MAXIMUM BEAUFORT SCALE 4, DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND NO
NEGATIVE INFLUENCE SWELL (DSS 3 MEAN THE COMBINATION OF SEA AND SWELL HEIGHT LESS
THAN 1.25M) ON EVEN KEEL IN STILL AND DEEP WATER WITH CLEAN BOTTOM, SEA BUOY TO SEABUOY, EXCLUDING CANALS, NARROWS, RESTRICTED WATERS, SUCH AS MALACCA STRAIT, CHINA
COAST, SEA OF JAPAN, ENGLISH CHANNEL, ETC, AND PERIODS WHEN SPEED IS REDUCED DUE TO
CHARTERERS’ ORDER, REASONS OF SAFETY AND POOR VISIBILITY, ETC. VSL HAS THE RIGHT TO USE
ADDITIONAL QUANTITIES OF MGO FOR HER MAIN ENGINE WHEN/WHERE MANOEVERING IN/OUT
PORTS IN RIVERS, CANALS, SHALLOW, NARROW, BUSY OR RESTRICTED WATERS. THE ASSESSMENT OF
THE VESSEL’S AVERAGE PERFORMANCE (I.E. SPEED & FUEL CONSUMPTION) SHALL ONLY APPLY TO
PERIODS OF 24 OR MORE CONSECUTIVE HOURS SAILED IN GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS AS
DEFINED IN THIS CHARTER PARTY, FAVORABLE CURRENT NOT BE DEDUCTED IN SPEED ASSESSMENT. ANY UNDER PERFORMANCE CLAIM SHALL BE RESTRICTED TO ASSESSMENT IN GOOD WEATHER
PERIODS ONLY, I.E. ANY LOSSES ALLEGED TO HAVE BEEN IDENTIFIED IN GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS
ARE NOT TO BE EXTRAPOLATED SO AS TO APPLY TO PERIODS OUTSIDE THE DEFINITION OF GOOD
WEATHER. PERIODS SAILED IN CONDITIONS OUTSIDE THE DEFINITION OF GOOD WEATHER ARE NOT
TO BE SUBJECT TO ANY ASSESSMENT WHATSOEVER. “ABOUT” WHICH MEANS COMPLYING WITH THE BELOW PREVAILING STANDARDS: - SPEED CALCULATION APPLIES A MINUS 0.5 KNOT ALLOWANCE WHEN AN “ABOUT” IS APPLIED TO
SPEED WARRANTY, AND
A PLUS 5% TOLERANCE IN OVER-CONSUMPTION CALCULATION IS EMPLOYED WHEN AN “ABOUT” IS
APPLIED TO FUEL CONSUMPTION WARRANTY. -ANY TIME PROVEN TO BE LOST SHALL BE SET OFF AGAINST ANY BUNKERS SAVED (INCL. PLUS 5%
ALLOWANCE) AND ANY PROVEN BUNKER OVER CONSUMPTION SHALL BE SET OFF AGAINST ANY
TIME SAVED (INCL. -0.5 KNOT ALLOWANCE) -EXTRAPOLATION OF “GOOD WEATHER” PERFORMANCE FOR “BAD WE ATHER” PERIODS IS NOT
ALLOWED. (ALL DETAILS IN ABOUT)
Best Regards
